name: The Scenario Bot
description:
I noticed that it's hard to find hyper specific scenarios for specific characters here, even with the very very broad variety of bots to be found on the website. So I decided to make a bot that will be simple and just let you tell it the scenario and go from there, I hope you guys enjoy!

It has no limits so go absolutely wild, the bot is here to let you experience scenarios you can't find with other available bots!

You will still PROBABLY have to be specific with your information, especially if it is from a fictional universe, bots will be bots and don't know absolutely everything after all. I tried my best, but if it proves to be a hassle I will just accept the bad reviews. :(
creator: CoffeeQueenClown
